title: 2026 Golden Globes Predictions from an Entertainment Editor
text: Best Actress in a Motion Picture - Musical or Comedy. PureWow's Prediction: Amanda Seyfried for 'The Testament of Ann Lee'. Nominees: Rose Byrne, 'If I Had Legs I'd Kick You'; Cynthia Erivo, 'Wicked: For Good'; Kate Hudson, 'Song Sung Blue'; Chase Infiniti, 'One Battle After Another'; Amanda Seyfried, 'The Testament of Ann Lee'; Emma Stone, 'Bugonia'. Analysis: The author acknowledges this category remains quite competitive. While expressing admiration for Erivo's performance in the 'Wicked' sequel, the prediction ultimately favors Seyfried for her portrayal of Ann Lee, founder of the Shakers religious movement. The category description notes: 'This category in particular seems wide open,' suggesting genuine uncertainty among contenders like Infiniti and Seyfried.
